india_trends.title: FY27 earnings growth may drop to 10%: Jitendra Sriram on the impact of sustained $100 oil
india_trends.summary: The war forced changes on quite a few fronts. First was a re-assessment of the “new-normal” for crude and on certain commodities where supply impacts were felt. As an example within the energy space, we cut back on oil marketing and moved towards upstream oil. That was a change in stance itself.

india_trends.title: Cabinet to soon approve Rs 37,500 cr incentive scheme to promote coal gasification projects
india_trends.summary: The Union Cabinet is poised to approve a Rs 37,500 crore incentive scheme to promote coal gasification projects. This initiative aims to boost clean energy production, reduce import dependence on critical commodities like LNG and urea, and enhance the utilization of domestic coal resources.
